tools.name: get_setting
tools.description: Reads an allowlisted setting. Use exact "key" from list_settings (e.g. Appearance.Theme). Alias "theme" is accepted for Appearance.Theme.

tools.name: set_setting
tools.description: Writes an allowlisted setting. Keys must match list_settings (e.g. Appearance.Theme for light/dark theme); alias "theme" also works. Value must match the setting type.

tools.name: list_settings
tools.description: Lists known setting keys. Optional category: App, User, Editor, AI, Appearance (theme).

tools.name: reset_setting
tools.description: Resets a writable setting to its documented default.
